name: Expelliarmus
description: Removes the opponent's strongest card from their hand.

name: Stupefy
description: Opponent's next attack deals half damage.

name: Protego Maxima
description: Nullifies all incoming damage this turn.

name: Expecto Patronum
description: Clears all negative effects and deals heavy damage to dark creatures.

name: Episkey
description: Restores 2 HP to the caster.

name: Bombarda
description: Deals damage to both opponents in 2v2.

name: Confringo
description: Opponent takes an extra 10 power damage next turn.

name: Sectumsempra
description: Bypasses enemy shields.

name: Lumos Solem
description: Opponent's next attack has a 50% chance to miss.

name: Priori Incantatem
description: Copies the opponent's previous spell power.

name: Avada Kedavra
description: If opponent is below 3 HP, instantly kills them.

name: Crucio
description: Deals massive damage and disables opponent's heal spells.

name: Imperio
description: Forces the opponent to attack their teammate in 2v2.

name: Morsmordre
description: Reduces the power of opponent's hand by 10 for the rest of the game.

name: Fiendfyre
description: Uncontrollable fire. 25% chance to damage yourself.

name: Serpensortia
description: Opponent takes 5 damage every turn.

name: Legilimens
description: Reveals the opponent's hand and guarantees a critical hit next turn.

name: Oppugno
description: Summons objects to attack. Ignores standard shields.

name: Obscuro
description: Opponent cannot see their cards next turn.

name: Levicorpus
description: Opponent skips their next turn.
